description:
Wow - I just spent a nice amount of time(couple of hours), analyzing something... Only to find that it's SOOOO simple! :'(

(I created a number of SGFs - Some of the variations, are nice enought to be problems on their own - Hence - I won't be adding a listing of variations - I will however add the most commonly tried variations)

(Guh - Forgot to ask if I can publish the nicks... I'll ask, and depending on the anwser, I might change it later...)

(Thanks to Hans and Spica for the comments..)

(AND A HUGE THANKS TO SPICA, FOR THE MAJOR CORRECTIONS)
sgf:
(;SZ[19]AW[hn]AW[io]AW[ko]AW[lo]AW[hp]AW[hq]AW[nq]AW[hr]AW[nr]AB[qn]AB[dp]AB[jp]AB[lp]AB[pp]AB[fq]AB[kq]AB[pq]AB[ir]AB[mr]LB[bn:S]C[You'll like this one... :) ('S' to start) (Thanks, alot to Spica, for fixing me - really, ALOT!)FORCE]GM[1]FF[4]CA[UTF-8]AP[CGoban:2]ST[2]RU[Japanese]KM[0.00]PL[W];W[bn];B[cn]LB[bm:Y]LB[bo:N]C[Can u kill the black 'group'(L2), if Black plays first?FORCE]
(;W[bo];B[co]C[i c... well then, how would u open the attack?]
(;W[no]C[nice! RIGHT])
(;W[mp]C[nice! RIGHT]))
(;W[bm]
(;B[no]C[ALERT-ALERT-ALERT -Black has escaped-  ALERT-ALERT-ALERT CHOICE])
(;B[mp]C[ALERT-ALERT-ALERT -Black has escaped-  ALERT-ALERT-ALERT CHOICE])))
source: A KGS game between _19k and a _9k
